message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram
    participant User
    participant Ops
    participant EmissionsController as EmissionsController
    participant Vaults as Vaults
    participant MTA as MTA

    Note over EmissionsController, Vaults, MTA: Weekly Rewards to Vaults

    actor User
    actor Ops

    User->>EmissionsController: setVoterDialWeights ([dial ids], [weights])
    EmissionsController->>User: ~proportions voting power across dials for future distributions

    Note over EmissionsController: Calculates and stores rewards for each dial

    Note over Vaults, MTA: Stream MTA to Users

    Note over Vaults: transfer MTA from Emissions Controller to Vault

    Note over Vaults: transfer MTA from Vault to User
